name: Tiny Kitchen ML10
description: 2D kitchen countertop simulation covering all 10 Meta-World ML10 manipulation tasks: reach, push, pick-place, door-open, drawer-close, drawer-open, button-press, peg-insert, window-open, window-close.

ports.name: Kitchen
ports.description: 2D kitchen countertop simulation for ML10 manipulation benchmark

capabilities.purpose: Push cutting board to counter center

skills.name: Peg Insert
